name: Create Fraction Equivalence Flipchart
description: Create a 2-page math lesson flipchart about equivalent fractions in ActivInspire. On the first page, include the title 'Fraction Vocabulary' and definitions for 'Numerator' and 'Denominator'. On the second page, create a fraction wall diagram using a visual stack of rectangles to show equivalence (1 Whole = 2 Halves = 4 Quarters = 8 Eighths). The diagram should consist of four rows: Row 1 (one rectangle labeled '1 Whole'), Row 2 (two rectangles labeled '1/2'), Row 3 (four rectangles labeled '1/4'), and Row 4 (eight rectangles labeled '1/8'), with each row using a distinct color. Save the final file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/fraction_lesson.flipchart.
